# Reference Screenshots

## Local screenshot evidence

Place images under:

```text
reference-screenshots/
```

Supported extensions:

```text
.png .jpg .jpeg .webp
```

## Screenshot index

| File | Reference ID | Viewport | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|

## External-only references

If screenshots cannot be stored locally, list links and rationale.
